scope: bounded pure uBLK qid/tag lifecycle source model for read, write, flush, discard, completion, abort, timeout, and timeout reissue; no uBLK daemon, ioctl, or product block I/O runtime behavior
residual_risk: The qid/tag fixture is source-model evidence only. It does not prove uBLK daemon runtime behavior, qemu execution, fio or mkfs workload breadth, crash durability, production block-device readiness, or broader uBLK ABI coverage.
